name: whatsappchatbot
description: WhatsApp Navigation Chatbot — Spring Boot Backend

scripts.kill: powershell -Command "$p=(netstat -ano|Select-String ':8085 '|%{($_.Line -split '\s+')[-1]}|?{$_ -match '^\d+$' -and $_ -ne '0'}|Select -Unique); if($p){taskkill /PID $p /F; Write-Host 'Killed PID' $p}else{Write-Host 'Port 8085 is free'}"
